raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS -** A can of 7UP is on a dark countertop. A red apple and a clear bottle are also present. The 7UP can is cylindrical with a label, the apple is round and red, and the bottle is transparent with a cap. The can is the target object. STRATEGY - Reach for the can, grasp it, and lift it. Failure modes include misreaching the can or dropping it. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the can body; Step 2 grasp the can body for secure hold; Step 3 lift the can.

Goal: held(7up_can)
Scene: 7up_can, apple, bottle, countertop
Step 1: reach(7up_can)
  affordance_region: the body of the 7up can
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, 7up_can, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, 7up_can) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(7up_can)
  affordance_region: the body of the 7up can
  contact: holding(7up_can) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(7up_can)
Step 3: lift(7up_can)
  affordance_region: the body of the 7up can
  contact: holding(7up_can) [progress]
  spatial: above(7up_can, countertop, 0.1) [completion]
  done_when: above(7up_can, countertop, 0.1)
<END_OF_PLAN>
